error.signature: An error occurred while resolving packages: Package com.unity.render-pipelines.universal@14.0.8 has invalid dependencies
error.regex: (error.*resolving packages|Package.*invalid dependencies|Package Manager.*resolution|Cannot resolve.*package|Dependency.*could not be resolved|manifest.*conflict)

verdict.summary: Unity Package Manager cannot resolve package dependencies. Version conflicts, missing registry, or incompatible Unity version.

dead_ends.action: Manually edit Library/PackageCache to fix versions
dead_ends.why_fails: PackageCache is auto-managed. Manual edits are overwritten immediately on next resolve.
Packages/manifest.json defines your dependencies. Deleting it removes all packages from the project.

workarounds.action: Edit Packages/manifest.json to fix version conflicts
workarounds.how: Open manifest.json > ensure all package versions are compatible with your Unity version; check release notes

workarounds.action: Reset package state by deleting Packages/packages-lock.json
workarounds.how: Delete packages-lock.json > Unity will re-resolve all dependencies from manifest.json on next load

workarounds.action: Add or change the scoped registry for third-party packages
workarounds.how: In manifest.json add scopedRegistries with the correct URL for OpenUPM or custom registries
